# Scorebac

> Scorebac provides exam calculators, grade calculators, result guides, and educational resources for students in multiple countries.

Website: https://scorebac.com
Language: French, Arabic, English, Turkish

## Main

- Home: https://scorebac.com/
- Contact: https://scorebac.com/contact/
- About: https://scorebac.com/a-propos/

## Calculators

- Algeria - Bac Average Calculator: https://scorebac.com/algerie/calculer-moyenne-bac/
- Morocco - Bac Average Calculator: https://scorebac.com/maroc/calculer-moyenne-bac/
- Côte d'Ivoire - BEPC Calculator: https://scorebac.com/coteivoire/calculer-moyenne-bepc/
- France - Bac Simulator: https://scorebac.com/france/simulateur-bac/
- Turkey - YÖS Score Calculator: https://scorebac.com/turkey/yös-puan-hesaplama/

## Tunisia

- Orientation Guide: https://scorebac.com/tunisie/guide-orientation/
- Bac Science Calculator: https://scorebac.com/calculer-moyenne-bac-science/
- Bac Math Calculator: https://scorebac.com/calculer-moyenne-bac-math/
- Bac Info Calculator: https://scorebac.com/calculer-moyenne-bac-info/
- Bac Eco Gestion Calculator: https://scorebac.com/calculer-moyenne-bac-eco-gestion/
- Bac Lettres Calculator: https://scorebac.com/calculer-moyenne-bac-lettres/
- Bac Technique Calculator: https://scorebac.com/calculer-moyenne-bac-technique/
- Bac Sport Calculator: https://scorebac.com/calculer-moyenne-bac-sport/

## Results & Guides

- Algeria Bac Results Guide: https://scorebac.com/algerie/resultat-bac-algerie/
- Cameroon GCE Results: https://scorebac.com/cameron/gce-results/
- Kenya KPSEA Results: https://scorebac.com/kenya/kpsea-results/
- Kenya KCSE Results: https://scorebac.com/kenya/kcse-results/
- Algeria Minimum Admission Averages: https://scorebac.com/algerie/moyennes-minimales-bac/
- Botswana BGCSE Calculator: https://scorebac.com/botswana/calcul-bgcse/

## Policies

- Privacy Policy: https://scorebac.com/politique-de-confidentialite/
- Terms of Use: https://scorebac.com/conditions-utilisation/

## Description

Scorebac publishes educational tools that help students calculate examination averages, estimate final scores, understand grading systems, check examination result information, and access university admission resources across several countries.
